description: Master workflow for deep audit of Simora OneDrive (5.753 nodes, 27GB, 8 áreas de negocio). Orchestrates 5 phases sequentially. Each phase produces a structured report under reports/audit/YYYY-MM-DD/.
preconditions: Graph simora-onedrive populated via tenant_ms_onedrive_snapshot (run with max_depth=20)

phases.name: inventory-and-classification
phases.description: Classify every file by type (spreadsheet/pdf/image/etc.) + produce summary stats per area, year, category

phases.name: duplicate-detection
phases.description: Detect duplicate files by (name, size) across the entire tree. Quantifies wasted storage.

phases.name: per-area-deep-dive
phases.description: For each area (Contabilidad, Logística, Marketing, RRHH, Ventas, Producción, Diseño) produce a targeted report: key files, gaps in time-series (missing months), classification breakdown.

phases.name: content-extraction
phases.description: Download + parse key XLSX / PDF for accounting (extractos, estado_cuenta) and logistics (reportes courier) into structured datasets. Extracts data without loss for downstream cruces.

phases.name: cleanup-and-recommendations
phases.description: Cross-reference duplicates + orphan/empty files + misplaced items (by name pattern vs parent area). Produces actionable cleanup list.

final_deliverable: reports/audit/<date>/00-executive-summary.md — aggregated findings, top risks, recommended actions
